name: Isthmus-Mecayapan Nahuatl

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Isthmus-Mecayapan Nahuatl (isth1242).

notes: Skeleton. Uto-Aztecan (Nahuan) variety of the Isthmus of Veracruz written in an SIL-based practical orthography. Digraphs ch=[tʃ], ts=[ts], cu/qu for [kʷ]/[k], hu=[w] and x=[ʃ], j=[h] are mapped; this variety merged the historic tl to [t]. Voiced stops b d g occur as allophones of the voiceless series in some contexts. Vowel length and the glottal stop are only partly recovered from spelling, raising the PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Isthmus-Mecayapan Nahuatl (isth1242)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
